name: card-scanner
description: 컨설턴트용 명함 스캔 웹앱 (Claude Vision + CLOVA OCR + Google Sheets)

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
